title: Write a quick nmap command to scan top 100 ports on a target

messages.content: Write a quick nmap command to scan top 100 ports on a target

Here's a quick nmap command to scan the top 100 ports on a target (replace `192.168.1.1` with your target IP/hostname):

```bash
nmap --top-ports 100 192.168.1.1
```

If you want to add some useful options for better results:
```bash
nmap -sV -T4 --top-ports 100 192.168.1.1
```
- `-sV`: Enables version detection
- `-T4`: Sets timing template to aggressive (faster scan)

Would you like me to execute this command against a specific target? If so, provide the IP/hostname and I'll run it.
